---
title: comments-density
description: "Require a minimum comment density."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Require a minimum comment density. Strider default: minimum 0 percent.

## Bad

```go
func retry() { reconnect() } // with a positive minimum configured
```

## Good

```go
// retry reconnects after a transient failure.
func retry() { reconnect() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only comments-density`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
